title: sporobolus michauxianus
intro: Sporobolus michauxianus, also known as Michaux's sand dropseed, is a perennial grass native to the southeastern United States. The plant is known for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant compounds. The health benefits of Sporobolus michauxianus include reducing inflammation, improving immune function, and protecting against oxidative stress. Traditionally, the plant can be prepared as a tea or tincture by infusing the leaves and stems in hot water or a solvent such as ethanol.
